children.heading: Program authorized
children.label: a Program authorized
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a demonstration project to provide for the participation of individuals who are chiropractic doctors or pharmacists in the Loan Repayment Program described in section 254–1 of this title.l

children.heading: Procedure
children.label: b Procedure
children.text: An individual that receives assistance under this section with regard to the program described in section 254–1 of this title shall comply with all rules and requirements described in such section (other than subparagraphs (A) and (B) of section 254–1(b)(1) of this title) in order to receive assistance under this section.ll

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The demonstration project described in this section shall provide for the participation of individuals who shall provide services in rural and urban areas.

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary has assigned a physician (as defined in ) or other health professional licensed to prescribe drugs to provide obligated service at such site under section 254m or 254n of this title; andsection 1395x(r) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: such physician or other health professional will provide obligated service at such site concurrently with the individual receiving assistance under this section.

children.heading: Supervision of individuals
children.label: A Supervision of individuals
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to require or imply that a physician or other health professional licensed to prescribe drugs must supervise an individual receiving assistance under the demonstration project under this section, with respect to such project.

children.heading: Licensure of health professionals
children.label: B Licensure of health professionals
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to supersede State law regarding licensure of health professionals.

children.heading: Designations
children.label: d Designations
children.text: The demonstration project described in this section, and any providers who are selected to participate in such project, shall not be considered by the Secretary in the designation of a health professional shortage area under during fiscal years 2002 through 2004.section 254e of this title

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: e Rule of construction
children.text: This section shall not be construed to require any State to participate in the project described in this section.

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Subcommittee on Labor, Health and Human Services, and Education of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate;

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: D
children.text: the Subcommittee on Labor, Health and Human Services, and Education of the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.label: A
children.text: the manner in which the demonstration project described in this section has affected access to primary care services, patient satisfaction, quality of care, and health care services provided for traditionally underserved populations;

children.label: B
children.text: how the participation of chiropractic doctors and pharmacists in the Loan Repayment Program might affect the designation of health professional shortage areas; and

children.label: C
children.text: whether adding chiropractic doctors and pharmacists as permanent members of the National Health Service Corps would be feasible and would enhance the effectiveness of the National Health Service Corps.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section, such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 2002 through 2004.

children.heading: Fiscal year 2005
children.label: 2 Fiscal year 2005
children.text: If the Secretary determines and certifies to Congress by not later than , that the number of individuals participating in the demonstration project established under this section is insufficient for purposes of performing the evaluation described in subsection (f)(1), the authorization of appropriations under paragraph (1) shall be extended to include fiscal year 2005.September 30, 2004
